##LOCALITY=Penge mine, Transvaal, South Africa
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=California Institute of Technology
##DESCRIPTION=Aggregate of tan colored parallel fibers. The Penge mine is the source of UICC standard for amosite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R070204
